name: Idle Image
flavor: A little something to hold the audience's attention while your other hand does the real work.
components: Prop (a scrap of silk or a coin)
description: You conjure a harmless sound or image of an object no larger than a 5-foot cube within range - a burst of applause, a shimmering curtain, a shadow that looks like a second performer standing in the wings. The illusion has no substance and cannot deal damage, move on its own, or convincingly imitate a specific creature's voice or appearance beyond a rough silhouette. Any creature that uses its action to inspect the image can determine it is an illusion with a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your {{trick save DC|8 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}}. The image lasts until you dismiss it (no action required), you move more than 30 feet from it, or its duration ends.
sheetSummary: Action, 30 ft. Harmless illusory sound or image (max 5-ft cube), up to 1 minute or until dismissed/out of range. No damage, no self-movement, no true creature mimicry. Investigation check vs trick save DC to see through on close inspection.
